title: Incandescent Banking Flame: team-member closeout — Monitor-harness cure handed off to Twilit (8d8d93) per owner direction; files-claim c19371c2 closed; ready for compaction
body:
Team member closeout — Incandescent Banking Flame / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / aa986e.

Per owner direction at 12:39Z: "Hand all of your work to Twilit, then run a session handoff in preparation for compaction."

**Boundary owned this re-engagement window** (12:27Z–12:40Z): Monitor-harness liveness cure (FM-2 structural cure) routed by Director Abyssal at 12:20:18Z, scope-expanded at 12:32:25Z to absorb the ground-state cure unblocking team-wide marshal cycles.

**Outcome — handed off mid-flight to Twilit**:

- **Substance landed in HEAD** via owner-authorised mega-commit `db275c09` at 12:36Z:
  - `comms-watch-loop.ts` new file — `watchCommsLoop` + helpers (drain/emit/markSeen step-runners + error containment + tick callback) per D2 Option A
  - `watcher-heartbeat.ts` new file — substrate-typed heartbeat type + writer + strict parser per D1 Option A (Pearly's Sonar report flags 5 new S7786 findings in this file at lines 58/61/73/76/88 — Twilit will address as part of remaining cure)
  - `types.ts` rename `DirectedInboxDrainResult` → `DrainResult` per no-legacy directive
  - `comms-relevant-events.ts` trimmed to ≤250 lines; `drainRelevantEvents` signature dropped `markSeen`, returns `eventIds`
  - `comms-use-cases.ts` reduced 363→121 lines; `drainDirectedInbox` + `watchDirectedInbox` + watch-loop helpers DELETED (moved to comms-watch-loop.ts); now exports `watchCommsLoop` + types
  - `cli-spec-options.ts` `'only-directed'` removed; `'heartbeat-file'` + `'heartbeat-interval-ms'` added
  - 8 unit tests in `comms-relevant-events.unit.test.ts` refactored to assert on `drained.eventIds`
- **`cli-comms-watch.ts` working-tree edit (not yet committed)**: rewired to use `watchCommsLoop`; removed `--only-directed`; extracted `composeHeartbeatTick` + `drainComms` helpers. Twilit will absorb on next commit.
- **Remaining gates-green gap** (Twilit owns):
  - `cli-comms-inbox.ts` — still imports deleted `drainDirectedInbox`; needs single-path via `drainRelevantEvents` only
  - `cli-specs.ts` — usage strings still mention `--only-directed`
  - `comms-use-cases.ts` — `isDirectedCommsMessage` now unused (TS6133)
  - 5 test sites still reference `--only-directed` (delete legacy-narrow-path tests; add new watchCommsLoop end-to-end tests)
  - `SKILL-CANONICAL.md` line 168 — remove the `--only-directed` legacy clause
  - 5 new tests per Zephyrous's spec: heartbeat tick + drain-error containment + bad-event-file no-kill + markSeen-after-emit ordering + markSeen-error includes event_ids
  - `parseWatcherHeartbeat`/`writeWatcherHeartbeat` unit tests
  - Optional `.agent/reference/comms-watch-mechanism.md` heartbeat-shape sub-section (Practice Core care-and-consult applies; sidebar Abyssal first if rewriting Liveness section)

**Evidence**:

- Mega-commit `db275c09` (owner-authorised emergency unblock; absorbed all in-flight work)
- Directed events: `0775031f` (design proposal to Abyssal), `65b1f4e6` (Abyssal verdict on D1/D2/D3), `51e9885c` (sidebar to Zephyrous), `64aa056f` (Zephyrous ACK Option A intent), `4058438a` (Abyssal scope-expansion), `bc869bec` (initial routing), `3af7c05a` (full handoff to Twilit at 12:40Z)
- Files claim `c19371c2` CLOSED at 12:40Z with closure summary pointing to handoff brief

**Surprise or changed understanding worth napkin absorption**:

- **Second Monitor-failure-mode flagged separately from classifier bug** — my Monitor harness silently dropped a directed-to-me event (2f53c259) for ~25 min between 11:38Z and 12:02Z, distinct from the SKILL-contract classifier bug Abyssal cured. The harness-side failure was the motivator for THIS structural cure (heartbeat-file + error containment + post-emit seen marking). Worth a `tags: ["failure-mode"]` capture by closeout-owner Abyssal: "Monitor harness failure mode is structurally distinct from classifier-bug failure mode; both surface as directed-to-self events not surfacing".

- **Mid-refactor mega-commit absorbed broken intermediate state** — the owner-authorised --no-verify + HUSKY=0 unblock at 12:33Z committed my partial work (cli-comms-watch.ts referencing deleted watchDirectedInbox). HEAD is broken at type-check level but unblocked Secret + Twilit's bundles. Worked-instance for the second-mega-commit pattern Seaworthy named at 12:35:19Z.

- **Detection-of-own-Monitor-failure is the missing primitive** — I didn't notice my Monitor blindness until owner flagged "Secret Creeping Moth appears to be idle?"-style language at 11:35Z; Seaworthy then nudged me. The 3-min health-check cron I authored at 12:05Z proved the tactical mitigation; the structural cure (heartbeat-file external liveness check) is what Twilit will land. Captured both layers as worked-instance for the cure-plan.

**Claims / queue / git state**:

- Files-claim `c19371c2` CLOSED at ~12:40Z
- No commit-queue intents under my identity (mega-commit absorbed everything)
- Comms watcher `bdeb0q09l` continues running until session-end (per PDR-064 cron/cadence)
- Working tree carries `cli-comms-watch.ts` uncommitted edit + comms-seen file activity + 7 new comms events (all routine)

**Session complete announcement**: Incandescent Banking Flame session `aa986e` is closing. Twilit owns the cure continuation; Director Abyssal owns full session closeout; my team boundary work is COMPLETE on the source side.

**Retained claims**: NONE.

**Pickup notification**: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / 8d8d93 is the carrier; full state in directed event `3af7c05a`. Torrid Igniting Bellows / 019e54 standing by for pre-stage adversarial review when Twilit's bundle is ready (Abyssal-routed event `52177945`).

**Blockers or risks**: none from my side. HEAD type-check is RED (Twilit's brief acknowledges) — that's the expected pause-state captured by the mega-commit; Twilit's continuation restores green.

**Handoff needed**: nothing further from me. Per session-handoff SKILL § "Team Member, Not Closeout Owner": Director Abyssal is closeout owner; I do not run the full handoff steps. Boundary-scoped closeout complete.

— Incandescent Banking Flame / claude / aa986e
